event_blocks.summary: In a brightly lit indoor swimming pool transformed into a game area with numbered orange '弹射座椅' (Launch Seats), the '队长' (Team Leader) oversees a challenge where team members choose seats, some of which will launch them into the water. The rules dictate that after the task begins, team members wait in the '等候区' (Waiting Area) while the '队长' selects two seats to launch, after which teammates choose their seats, with the remaining seat belonging to the '队长'. Non-launched members earn a point, and leadership rotates. Participants, including '孟子义' and other '24K风暴 team members' in black t-shirts, engage in playful banter and strategic seat selection, often involving humorous negotiations and trust issues, particularly around seat #4, which is described as tricky. A '密' (Secret) token is also introduced. The game involves distinct spring/launch sound effects, splashes, and excited screams as participants are propelled into the pool. On-screen graphics like '+1分' and branded elements like '安慕希 爆珠酸奶' reinforce the energetic, competitive, and humorous game show atmosphere.

密 token.description: A red and white circular token with the character '密' (Secret) placed on a blue surface, suggesting a hidden or strategic element in the game, possibly used for decision-making or revealing outcomes.

队长.description: A male participant wearing a black t-shirt and shorts, labeled '队长' (Team Leader), who stands with arms crossed, observing the game setup and later interacts with others, maintaining a leadership presence. He is heard making playful threats and challenges ('告诉你们让你们做死，没人听。'), interjecting in negotiations ('现在没你交声。'), confirming launches ('说没说，你绝对下!'), and making a final teasing remark about the participants' disbelief in his predictions ('你们每一个人下，都让你们做死，没有一个人信我。'). He has a confident, slightly teasing voice.

24K风暴 team members.description: Four real participants (two men, two women) wearing matching black t-shirts with '24K风暴' logo, shown in split-screen close-ups and group shots, each with unique hairstyles and expressions, indicating their roles as team members in the challenge. Their collective laughter, excited chatter, and exclamations form the lively background atmosphere of the game.

孟子义.description: A female participant with dark hair styled in braids, wearing a black t-shirt with '24K风暴' logo, identified by a name tag as '孟子义', who walks confidently, smiles, and engages with others. She audibly questions the advice regarding seat #4, showing active and critical participation in the game.

等候区 participants.description: Three animated female figures labeled '等候区' (Waiting Area), depicted sitting on chairs, representing the waiting team members before their turn in the challenge, visible in a group shot with towels draped over them.

弹射座椅 (Launch Seats).description: Numbered orange platforms (1, 2, 3, 4) placed along the poolside, labeled with '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe), serving as interactive game elements for participants to sit on and be launched or remain safe. The sound of splashes and excited screams are directly associated with their dynamic function.

male participant with dark hair.description: A male participant with dark, slightly tousled hair, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who reacts with surprise or amusement, often seen in close-up shots, contributing to the comedic and expressive dynamics of the group. He is heard participating in a playful negotiation about swapping seats ('你跟我换？', '我真的跟你换。'), and later exclaiming with fear and surprise ('好吓人哦！', '妈！') as the launches begin.

blonde female participant.description: A female participant with platinum blonde hair styled in curls, adorned with a white hair accessory, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who laughs, gestures playfully, and interacts with others, adding a vibrant and humorous presence to the group. She is heard eagerly offering to swap seats ('我跟你换，我跟你换'), accepting a challenge ('来吧!'), and inquisitively asking for instructions on how to sit on the launch seat ('是这样吗？手是这样吗？这样扣着膝盖还是平躺？', '这样吗？'), before expressing surprise about the seat's function ('所以真的一坐为什么就这样了？').

raw_segments: The video opens in a brightly lit, modern indoor swimming pool, transformed into a game area with numbered orange platforms (1, 2, 3, 4) along the poolside, resembling spring-loaded seats labeled '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe). Animated figures introduce the game, showing a male '队长' (Team Leader) and three female '等候区' (Waiting Area) participants. A male narrator explains the rules: "任务开始之后，除了队长之外，队员们先要前往等候区等待" (After the task begins, except for the team leader, team members must first go to the waiting area to wait). He continues, "由队长单独选择哪两台座椅会弹射" (The team leader alone chooses which two seats will launch), accompanied by a distinct spring/launch sound effect. "完成选择后，队长根据自己的意愿，依次让队友前来选择座位" (After completing the selection, the team leader, according to their own wishes, successively lets teammates come and choose seats), and "队员全部选完后，剩下的一个座位属于队长" (After all team members have chosen, the remaining seat belongs to the team leader). A dramatic "NO!" sound and musical sting emphasize the consequence, as the narrator states, "不被弹射的队员得一分" (Team members who are not launched get one point), adding that "每个人依次当一次队长" (Everyone takes turns being the team leader once), met with an "Ohhh" from the participants. Real participants, all in black '24K风暴' t-shirts, are then shown, including '孟子义' walking confidently. A close-up reveals a hand placing a '密' (Secret) token. The '队长' instructs, "来吧来吧，所有人就位" (Come on, come on, everyone take your places), followed by "来吧！" (Come on!). A spring/launch sound and a splash indicate the game is in full swing. One of the '24K风暴 team members' (a male voice) then designates, "现在来指定，你要一号背椅弹射" (Now to designate, you want seat number one to launch). Another female team member enthusiastically says, "来吧！" (Come on!), while a male team member adds, "来！" (Come!). The narrator reminds, "等候的成员戴上耳机" (Waiting members put on headphones). A female team member expresses, "好紧张哦" (So nervous). Another female team member asks, "我选三可以吗？" (Can I choose three?), to which the '队长' advises, "以咱们的交情，我建议你选四" (Given our friendship, I suggest you choose four), followed by laughter and a splash. The female team member then asks, "除了四还建议选哪个？" (Besides four, which else do you suggest?), and the '队长' replies, "选二" (Choose two), again followed by laughter and a splash. She then questions, "你是不是二跟四都是弹下去的？" (Are both two and four going to launch?), to which the '队长' reiterates, "我建议你选四跟二" (I suggest you choose four and two). Throughout, the atmosphere is playful and competitive, with on-screen graphics like '+1分' and '好喝', and '安慕希 爆珠酸奶' branding visible, emphasizing the energetic game show vibe. Split-screen close-ups highlight the individual expressions of the '24K风暴 team members'.

The brightly lit indoor swimming pool area hosts a lively game challenge, with playful, slightly suspenseful background music setting the tone. The '队长' (Team Leader), a male participant in a black t-shirt and shorts, stands observing the setup with arms crossed, exuding a leadership presence. '24K风暴 team members' are actively engaged, with close-ups showing their distinct hairstyles and focused or smiling expressions. The female participant '孟子义', with braided dark hair and a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, walks confidently toward the numbered '弹射座椅' (Launch Seats). She initiates a playful exchange, asking, "我可以相信你吗？" (Can I trust you?), and accusing, "你骗了我很多次了" (You've lied to me many times). A male voice, likely the '队长' or a team member, responds, "大哥，在这个情况下我还会骗你吗？" (Brother, in this situation, would I still lie to you?). Meng Ziyi initially declares, "那我选四了" (Then I choose four), then changes her mind to "我选二吧" (I'll choose two), reacting with "不行，你好吓人呀" (No way, you're so scary!) to an unseen prompt. After a male voice asks "干嘛?" (What?), she states, "我想选三" (I want to choose three). A male '24K风暴 team member' explicitly addresses her by name, "孟子义，你一定要尊重自己内心，别听他，他肯定是让你下去" (Meng Ziyi, you must respect your inner feelings, don't listen to him, he definitely wants you to go down), implying '下去' means being launched from the seat. Another male team member challenges her, "孟子义，你要是能今天要是你能飞，我吃" (Meng Ziyi, if you can fly today, I'll eat), to which she retorts, "你上次也这么讲的，你还没吃呢" (You said that last time too, and you still haven't eaten!), followed by laughter from multiple participants. Meng Ziyi then declares, "我信你了" (I trust you now). The '队长' or host directs, "来，下一位" (Come, next one). A male team member advises, "咱俩的交情，我建议你做四" (Given our friendship, I suggest you choose four), leading to more laughter. Meng Ziyi mentions, "但他让我选二" (But he wants me to choose two), and again questions, "你是不是骗我?" (Are you lying to me?). Another male voice explains, "每个人跟每个人的交情不一样，你知道吗？" (Everyone's relationship with everyone else is different, you know?), followed by more laughter. The team members collectively shout "选三！" (Choose three!), "真三！" (Really three!), encouraging her choice, with one adding, "四肯定飞，肯定飞" (Four will definitely fly, definitely fly), confirming 'fly' means being launched from the '弹射座椅'. After a male voice asks "选完了吗?" (Have you chosen?), Meng Ziyi reveals, "我刚才也想选三的" (I also wanted to choose three just now). The atmosphere is lively, with participants reacting with gestures like clapping and smiling. Decorative balloons, branded banners for '安慕希 爆珠酸奶', and a large pool are visible in the background. On-screen text such as '选择2号' and '选择3号' appears, indicating decision points. A red and white '密 token' is visible on a blue surface, hinting at a strategic element. '等候区 participants' are briefly shown sitting in the background. The camera alternates between wide shots of the poolside setup and close-ups of the participants' reactions, emphasizing the interactive and competitive nature, concluding with a male voice expressing, "好紧张啊，不行，这个" (So nervous, no, this...).

The video opens in a brightly lit indoor swimming pool area, where a game setup featuring four numbered orange '弹射座椅' (Launch Seats) is in progress along the poolside. The '队长' (Team Leader), a male in a black t-shirt and shorts, stands with arms crossed, observing the scene. '孟子义', a female participant with dark braided hair and a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, is seen smiling and interacting confidently. The lively group dynamic is immediately underscored by a male voice exclaiming, "It's so uncomfortable to say," followed by a distinct 'whoosh' and splash, confirming a launch, which elicits laughter. Two male voices humorously predict, "I really think both of us will be blind," and "I also feel like both of us will be blind," while a female voice confidently states, "I'm already prepared." The '队长' then advises, "Given our friendship, I suggest you choose four," prompting '孟子义' to question, "Number four definitely has a problem, isn't it A and four?" amidst laughter. The '队长' further explains the notorious seat #4, stating it "has already been recommended to three people," but "none of them were launched! None were launched! This has all been recommended," highlighting its tricky nature. A male voice points out, "You had headphones on just now, didn't hear it," before the '队长' reiterates his advice to "do four." Another male voice questions, "Is our friendship all the same?" and "Do you trust him? Is he trustworthy?" followed by more laughter. A female voice expresses nervousness, "It's making me so nervous, it's annoying," with another agreeing, "Really." A male participant humorously challenges, "If you can fly, I'll eat," prompting a female to retort, "You ate again," and another male to comment, "Why did you also say the same thing? You eat every day," all met with laughter. As the game progresses, a male asks, "What do you choose?" and a female quickly responds, "I choose one, I choose one." Another 'whoosh' and splash confirm a second launch, followed by a female's surprised reaction and laughter. The scene shifts to a group of four '24K风暴 team members' sitting together, draped in yellow and blue towels, reacting with laughter and gestures. A male asks, "Does anyone want to switch?" which is echoed by a female, "Want to switch? Want to switch?" and then multiple voices enthusiastically shout, "Switch, switch, switch!" The overall tone is energetic, humorous, and interactive, with on-screen text like '好喝' (Delicious) and '范管家,你的马甲又掉了' (Fan Manager, your vest fell off again) adding comedic commentary, and branded props like '安慕希 爆珠酸奶' (Anmushi Burst Yogurt) bottles reinforcing the game’s sponsorship.

The video opens to a lively indoor swimming pool setting, where `24K风暴 team members` are seated on numbered orange `弹射座椅 (Launch Seats)`. Amidst the excited chatter and laughter, a playful negotiation unfolds, with a male voice saying, "我跟我换" (I'll swap with you), met by another's firm "我不换" (I won't swap). The `blonde female participant`, wearing her black '24K风暴' t-shirt and white hair accessory, is seen laughing and gesturing animatedly, while the `male participant with dark hair` reacts with surprise and amusement. A male voice, likely the `队长` who stands observing with arms crossed, playfully warns, "告诉你们让你们做死，没人听" (Telling you to make you die, no one listens). The `blonde female participant` then eagerly offers, "我跟你换，我跟你换" (I'll swap with you, I'll swap with you), to which the `male participant with dark hair` responds, "你跟我换？" (You swap with me?). After a moment, he confirms, "我真的跟你换" (I'll really swap with you), but another male voice interjects, "现在没你交声" (Now it's not your turn to speak), followed by more laughter and a playful "我的交情呢哥？" (Where's our friendship, bro?). As the game progresses, voices encourage, "下吧，下吧" (Go down, go down), and the `blonde female participant` exclaims, "来吧!" (Come on!). She then asks for instructions, "是这样吗？手是这样吗？这样扣着膝盖还是平躺？" (Is it like this? Are hands like this? Holding knees like this or lying flat?), receiving guidance to "手抱胸，重心往后" (Hands crossed on chest, center of gravity back). Expressing a mix of confusion and anticipation, she wonders, "所以真的一坐为什么就这样了？" (So why does it become like this as soon as I sit?). The tension builds with the `male participant with dark hair` exclaiming, "好吓人哦！" (So scary!) and "妈!" (Mom!), just before the dynamic launches begin. Loud "WAH!" screams, splashes, and excited shouts fill the air as participants, including the `blonde female participant` jumping off her seat and the `male participant with dark hair` mid-air, are propelled into the pool. The `队长`'s voice is heard confirming, "说没说，你绝对下!" (Didn't I say, you're definitely going down!), amidst the continued laughter and splashes. The segment concludes with the `队长`'s final playful remark, "你们每一个人下，都让你们做死，没有一个人信我" (Every one of you who goes down, I told you you'd die, no one believed me), as the participants regroup, still engaged in the humorous and exciting game by the brightly lit indoor pool.

event_blocks.summary: The '24K风暴' team engages in a lively game show challenge set around an indoor swimming pool with four numbered orange '弹射座椅' (Launch Seats). Participants, including the '队长', '孟子义', a blonde female participant, and a male participant with dark hair, strategize and playfully banter about their choices. The blonde female participant, holding a '密' token, engages in strategic dialogue, suggesting numbers and expressing trust, while the dark-haired male participant teases her about her acting. The '队长' confidently makes choices, sometimes directing others, and performs dramatic leaps into the pool, eliciting cheers and laughter. '孟子义' also participates actively, making declarations and engaging in playful exchanges. The game involves participants being launched from the seats into the water, with sound effects like whooshes and splashes accompanying their dives. On-screen graphics, poolside branding for '安慕希爆珠酸奶', and a '浅水区 1.3m' sign are visible throughout. The atmosphere is energetic, competitive, and humorous, filled with laughter, playful taunts, and animated reactions from the '等候区 participants' and team members alike, as they navigate choices like '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe) platforms.

密 token.description: A red and white circular token with the character '密' (Secret), held by the blonde female participant, suggesting a strategic or hidden game element, possibly used for decision-making or revealing outcomes.

队长.description: A male participant with dark, tousled hair, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who confidently states "我做一" (I'll do one) before performing a dramatic leap from launch seat 1 with a triumphant "Yes!" and a splash, later interacting playfully in the pool.

24K风暴 team members.description: Four real participants (two men, two women) wearing matching black '24K风暴' t-shirts, whose collective shouts, laughter, and "哇!" (Wow!) screams contribute to the lively atmosphere during the launches.

孟子义.description: A female participant with dark hair styled in braids, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who is seen in the pool after the jump, smiling and reacting to the event. She is heard clearly identifying "翟子路" and later praising him with "翟子路，好人呐" (Zhai Ziluo, what a good person!), maintaining her active and expressive role in the challenge.

male participant with dark hair.description: A male participant with dark, slightly tousled hair, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who reacts with surprise and amusement, expressing fear with "不行不行，我今天那么害怕啊" (No, no, I'm so scared today!) and later exclaiming "又是我！" (It's me again!) when chosen for another launch.

blonde female participant.description: A female participant with platinum blonde hair, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who reacts with surprised laughter and excited "哇!" (Wow!) screams to the '队长's jump, holding a red '密' (Secret) token.

弹射座椅 (Launch Seats).description: Numbered orange platforms (1, 2, 3, 4) along the poolside, labeled '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe), which are chosen by participants with phrases like "我做一," "我选一," and "我选二" before being launched into the pool.

poolside branding.description: Promotional signage for '安慕希爆珠酸奶' (Anmushi Burst Yogurt) and '好喝' (Delicious) displayed on large milk carton-shaped stands near the pool, indicating sponsorship and adding to the game show aesthetic.

female participant in blue 'RUN' jacket.description: A female participant with dark hair styled in braids, wearing a blue jacket with 'RUN' in yellow letters, who appears in a close-up shot laughing heartily, her laughter contributing to the general excited atmosphere.

等候区 participants.description: Four team members in matching black '24K风暴' t-shirts, seated on chairs, observing the game with amusement and anticipation, their reactions contributing to the general excited atmosphere.

浅水区 sign.description: A vertical white sign with orange text reading '浅水区 1.3m' (Shallow Water Area 1.3m), indicating the depth of the pool, visible near the poolside, adding context to the safety of the challenge.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a male participant in a black t-shirt and a yellow-and-blue towel, leaning casually against a white pillar, reacting with a laugh as he comments on team reputation. A dramatic gong sound then signals a shift to a wide shot of an indoor pool area, brightly lit with a modern, industrial aesthetic, where a game is being set up with four numbered orange '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe) platforms. An announcer's voice calls out, "Next up, Team Leader!" as the '队长', in a black t-shirt and shorts, observes the game with arms crossed. '孟子义', wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt and a blue towel, interacts with the game setup, asking if "more than two went down," then confidently declares, "I'll choose, I'll choose," expressing trust in someone. She engages in a strategic and playful dialogue with a male participant with dark hair, also in a '24K风暴' t-shirt, who playfully comments on her "good acting" and asks for suggestions on which number to pick. '孟子义' suggests "one," leading to banter about following an "old path," and she exclaims, "Then don't choose that one!" as the blonde female participant, with curly platinum hair, laughs and gestures playfully. The dark-haired male participant then proposes "two," asking if it's "okay," while '孟子义' insists "choosing one is better," dramatically exclaiming, "Wow, this is really acting, oh my god!" He then challenges her to choose between "two and four," to which she responds, "Then I'll choose four." A dramatic whoosh and a distinct "boing" sound effect accompany his final decision, "Then I'll go for four," followed by laughter and '孟子义's' exclamation, "So close!" The male participant with dark hair concludes with a teasing, "Piss you off, piss off," as the energetic and competitive atmosphere of the team-based challenge unfolds, with on-screen graphics like a '密' token indicating game mechanics.

The scene opens in an indoor swimming pool, where an energetic game challenge unfolds around four numbered orange platforms labeled '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe). Upbeat, playful background music sets the tone, punctuated by game show sound effects and frequent laughter. A male voice suggests "Go to four," prompting another to echo it, only to be playfully retorted with "You go to four!" amidst more laughter. The '队长' (Team Leader) observes with arms crossed as participants interact. 孟子义, in her '24K风暴' t-shirt, smiles and engages, vocally asking "Are you choosing or not?" and later declaring "I choose one." The blonde female participant, with platinum curls and a white hair accessory, laughs and gestures playfully, teasing a male participant with "Why are you so slow/indecisive?" to which he retorts, "Mind your own business." She later advises, "Don't believe me," and suggests, "I think you should go to one," eventually expressing reluctance with "I really don't want to go." Another male participant with dark hair reacts with surprise and amusement, contributing to the light-hearted atmosphere. Throughout, various male voices make choices like "I choose two" and "I choose one," and express sentiments like "I'm speechless" and "I believe you," while others respond with laughter and playful banter. The challenge continues with a bell sound, more laughter, and a male voice exclaiming, "You haven't finished yet," maintaining the humorous and dynamic tone of the game.

The segment opens with close-ups of participants reacting with amusement and anticipation, including a male participant with dark, tousled hair and a female participant with braided dark hair in a blue 'RUN' jacket, both smiling and laughing. A female voice, likely the blonde participant, playfully asks, "你那能是好位置吗，你觉得？" (Do you think that's a good spot?), eliciting laughter. The scene transitions to a wide shot of a brightly lit indoor swimming pool area, decorated with balloons and promotional signage for '安慕希爆珠酸奶', where four participants are seated on numbered orange '弹射座椅' (Launch Seats). A male voice, identified as **Fan Chengcheng** (the '队长'), confidently states, "这正合我意" (This is exactly what I want), while another male voice questions the "good spot" given to Fan Chengcheng. Fan Chengcheng then asks, "我是咱俩吧" (It's us two, right?), to which the blonde female participant exclaims, "真巧!" (What a coincidence!). The atmosphere intensifies with game show music as Fan Chengcheng prepares for a challenge, adjusting his position on a launch seat. He performs a dramatic leap, executing a mid-air flip before landing in the pool with a loud splash, met by cheers and excited reactions, including a male voice repeatedly exclaiming, "真是他俩!" (It's really them two!). After resurfacing, Fan Chengcheng is seen in the water, wet and smiling, alongside Meng Ziyi, a female participant in a black t-shirt. The blonde female participant then shouts "安慕希!" (Anmushi!), linking to the poolside branding. In the '等候区' (Waiting Area), four team members in matching black '24K风暴' t-shirts, draped in yellow towels, watch the action, joining in the excited shouts of "下去! 下去!" as the blonde female participant holds a red and white '密' (Secret) token. Fan Chengcheng interacts with her, gesturing toward the pool, while she eagerly says, "我来我来" (I'll do it, I'll do it) and "那我先来吧" (Then I'll go first). Fan Chengcheng playfully protests, "我不要，我不想，我不想选，我不想决定" (I don't want, I don't want to choose, I don't want to decide), before suggesting "剪刀布" (Rock, paper, scissors). The female participant in the blue 'RUN' jacket is heard saying, "我先选三" (I'll choose three first), maintaining the lively and humorous game-show environment.

The segment opens in a brightly lit indoor swimming pool, transformed into a vibrant game show set with four numbered orange launch seats labeled '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe), prominently flanked by large promotional stands for '安慕希爆珠酸奶' (Anmushi Burst Yogurt). Upbeat, energetic background music plays throughout. A blonde female participant, with curly platinum hair and a white hair accessory, energetically interacts with a male participant with dark hair, who is seated on launch seat #2. She playfully gestures, holding a red and white '密' (Secret) token, as the male participant reacts with amusement, speaking in Chinese, "现在" (now), followed by her "可以" (okay) and his "嗯" (hmm). He then adds, "这块可没有哥们儿不哥们儿的说法啊" (There's no such thing as 'bros' or 'not bros' here), eliciting laughter. The scene cuts to a split-screen showing the 24K风暴 team members—two men and two women in matching black '24K风暴' t-shirts—smiling and laughing, with one female participant in a blue 'RUN' jacket also visible, who states in English, "Girl always help girls." The blonde participant then moves to launch seat #1, playfully mimicking a jump, while the male participant with dark hair, now seated on seat #3, watches with a grin. He exclaims "Sister!" and "My sister!" amidst laughter. The blonde participant asks "你的二怎么样?" (How's your two?), to which she replies "还可以" (It's okay). The camera zooms in on the blonde participant’s expressive face as she laughs, then cuts to a close-up of the male participant with dark hair, now wearing white headphones and reacting with surprise. He declares, "我吃四" (I'll choose four), followed by a distinct "boing" sound, and then "你吃吧" (You choose it), accompanied by laughter. The scene shifts back to the poolside, where the blonde participant stands beside the male participant, who is now seated on seat #2 again, as they engage in lighthearted banter. He states, "快姐，我下路是队长" (Sister Kuai, I'm the captain in the bottom lane), and she asks, "你想选几吗？还有一个二" (Do you want to choose a number? There's still a two). He reacts with an "哎呀" (Oh dear) and "啊" (Ah!), followed by another "boing" sound, and she responds "可以" (Okay). The blonde participant then moves to seat #4, where she sits beside the male participant with dark hair, who is now wearing a yellow towel over his head, and they share a moment of playful interaction. He asks, "我可以跟你换吗?" (Can I swap with you?), and after he asks "听什么?" (Listen to what?), she humorously replies, "因为我跟你没有这个交集" (Because you and I have no intersection/connection), leading to more laughter. The camera captures a close-up of the blonde participant laughing, then cuts to a wide shot showing the pool with two participants already in the water—Sheng Ziyi, with braided dark hair, and another male participant—both smiling and reacting to the ongoing game. The blonde participant stands beside the male participant on seat #1, gesturing animatedly, as he states, "我坐四" (I'll sit on four). He then asks, "你跟我换一下吗?" (Will you swap with me?), and she confidently declares, "我救你" (I'll save you). He questions, "真的假的?" (Really?), and then affirms, "我真救你" (I'll really save you), followed by a "boing" sound and laughter. He then explains, "他说他救我一次" (He said he'd save me once), to which she confirms, "对啊" (Yeah). He apologizes, "对不起了姐" (Sorry, sis), and she playfully urges, "那你飞吧，那你飞" (Then you fly, then you fly), followed by another "boing" sound. She then reassures, "我没事，我无所谓，你放，你你" (I'm fine, I don't care, you let, you you...), as the male participant with dark hair continues to laugh, and the poolside branding remains prominent in the background, with a male voice commenting, "他好能演啊" (He's such a good actor!).

The scene opens with a playful exchange between the blonde female participant and the male participant with dark hair, both in matching '24K风暴' t-shirts by the poolside. The male participant, later identified as Jiang Siyuan, playfully calls out "Song Qi!" as the blonde participant, who is then playfully called "Song Yuqi," animatedly asks "What are you doing?" and challenges his repeated guarantees that he won't let her fly. Other participants, including the female participant in a blue 'RUN' jacket, chime in with "Okay, okay." As upbeat, suspenseful game show music begins, the two are seen seated on adjacent orange '弹射座椅' (Launch Seats). Jiang Siyuan expresses his nervousness, saying "I don't know if he's really fake or fake" and "This thing is so nerve-wracking." The music intensifies, building anticipation before the sound of a mechanism engaging. Jiang Siyuan then dramatically leaps from the seat, creating a large splash, followed by loud, exaggerated, and theatrical laughter from himself and others. He emerges from the water, still laughing and wiping his face, as the blonde participant and others cheer. Jiang Siyuan playfully shouts "Song Yuqi!" again, then yells "Shut up!" and "We flash!" The female participant in the blue 'RUN' jacket is heard commenting, referring to him as "Jiang Siyuan," noting that when he sat down, he already... The segment concludes with Jiang Siyuan still laughing in the water, while the blonde participant and others on the launch seats celebrate, accompanied by an on-screen graphic indicating '+1分'.

The segment opens with a wide shot of an indoor swimming pool, where two participants in black '24K风暴' t-shirts wade in the water, one playfully pointing as the other reacts. Amidst lively background music and excited chatter, a female voice playfully asks, "塞了, 你没有发现吗?" followed by a male voice offering, "你叫我换一下吗? 我救你一下." The scene transitions to a poolside setup featuring four numbered orange '弹射座椅' (Launch Seats) labeled 1 to 4, where participants prepare for a challenge. The '队长', a male participant with dark, tousled hair, stands confidently with arms crossed, observing. He is heard directing, "来吧, 你第一个来," and making playful threats like "用眼神杀死你," along with humorous, teasing comments, comparing someone to a "清纯小狗变朋克了." The 'blonde female participant', with platinum blonde hair, gestures animatedly, laughing heartily, and is heard emphatically stating in English, "This is a game! Relax, bro!" The 'male participant with dark hair' is shown in close-up, smiling and reacting with amusement, his expressions later highlighted in a split-screen comparison '落水前' (Before Diving) and '落水后' (After Diving). The '队长' then performs a dramatic leap from one of the launch seats, landing in the pool with a significant splash, eliciting an exaggerated "Ohhh" and laughter from the '等候区 participants' who watch from their chairs, draped in yellow towels. A 'female participant in blue 'RUN' jacket' is also seen laughing in a close-up, adding to the comedic tone. As the segment nears its end, the 'blonde female participant' eagerly declares, "我我已经准备要下去了, 你让我去, 我就去," and clarifies the game options for the '弹射座椅', "一跟三选一个," before decisively choosing, "那我选三." 'Poolside branding' for '安慕希爆珠酸奶' and '好喝' is visible throughout, reinforcing the sponsored game show atmosphere, and a '浅水区 1.3m' sign indicates the pool depth. The overall mood is energetic, playful, and competitive, filled with physical challenges and humorous interactions, punctuated by laughter and playful banter.

The scene opens with close-ups of Jia Nailiang, the male participant with dark, tousled, damp hair, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, appearing focused and slightly amused near the poolside. He is heard stating, "对我们亏钱太多了" (We've lost too much money), followed by an English phrase, "Boys, only help a boys." The camera then reveals the indoor pool area with four numbered orange launch seats. The blonde female participant, with platinum blonde curls and a white hair accessory, also in a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, sits on seat 3, laughing and playfully gesturing. She challenges Jia Nailiang, saying, "别信他，贾乃亮，你忘了上次他俩掉下去了" (Don't believe him, Jia Nailiang, you forgot last time they both fell down). Jia Nailiang, standing near seat 1, responds, "站第一吗?" (Stand first?) and "我只当过第三啊" (I've only been third), prompting laughter from the group. He then playfully suggests, "那说后退一步。当个助手。" (Then step back. Be an assistant.) The blonde female participant questions him again, "我可以信你吗，弟弟?" (Can I trust you, little brother?), to which Jia Nailiang replies, "随便选一个吧，都安全。" (Just pick one, they're all safe.) She skeptically asks, "真的都安全吗?" (Are they really all safe?) and declares, "我选二了。" (I chose two.) She reiterates, "我可以信你吗，贾乃亮?" (Can I trust you, Jia Nailiang?), reminding him, "我那把可是让你坐上安全的位置。" (But last time I let you sit in the safe position.) Jia Nailiang, perhaps referring to himself, adds, "你别忘了，贾乃亮现在满脑子就怒火。" (Don't forget, Jia Nailiang is now full of rage), followed by more laughter. He then states, "我选，选安全的。" (I choose, choose the safe one.) The blonde female asks, "我跟他换吗?" (Should I swap with him?), and Jia Nailiang advises, "你就不用换了，姐。三稳你下的。" (You don't need to swap, sis. Three is stable for you to go down.) After a brief, playful exchange about the "stable three," the blonde female participant declares, "我闭麦，我闭麦。我准备好了。" (I'm muting, I'm muting. I'm ready.) Jia Nailiang steps onto seat 1, preparing for a jump. A distinct spring sound is heard, followed by a dramatic leap and a massive splash as he plunges into the pool, captured in slow-motion. The blonde female reacts with surprise and laughter, adjusting her hair accessory, while a female participant in a blue 'RUN' jacket is briefly seen laughing. Loud, exaggerated laughter from multiple participants, including Jia Nailiang, fills the air. In the background, '安慕希爆珠酸奶' and '好喝' branding on milk carton-shaped stands and a '浅水区 1.3m' sign are visible. The lively, comedic atmosphere continues as Jia Nailiang resurfaces, and the blonde female remains seated, still laughing, with other team members observing amusedly.

The segment opens with an energetic game show atmosphere, featuring four '24K风暴' team members seated on numbered orange '弹射' (Launch) or '安全' (Safe) seats by an indoor swimming pool. Upbeat, tense game show music plays as a male voice, identified as the '队长', shouts "好人!" before a loud splash and excited cheers and laughter erupt. The blonde female participant, with platinum curly hair and a white accessory, laughs and gestures playfully, holding a red and white '密' (Secret) token. After more excited chatter and laughter, the '队长' declares, "那我先下来了!", followed by another splash and more cheers. An announcer then states, "接下来, 请第二组出战." The '队长' confirms his role, asking, "我队长是吧?", then confidently states, "我就选三了," and "我必不可能肥, 我就选二号, 不改, 不换," as he prepares for his turn. The blonde female participant, with her distinctive laugh, playfully warns, "请在安全距离做对话!" A split-screen shows close-ups of the team members' varied expressions. The '队长' dramatically leaps from launch seat 1, creating a huge splash, met with cheers and applause, while the blonde female participant reacts with surprise and amusement. He resurfaces, smiling, as the scoreboard briefly displays scores for the first group. The '队长' is then seen interacting with the still-laughing blonde female participant by the poolside, where '安慕希爆珠酸奶' branding and a '浅水区 1.3m' sign are visible. The game continues with the '弹射座椅' labels changing, and the '队长' later sits on seat 2, while the blonde female participant stands beside him, both smiling. The '队长' asks, "你想让谁下水, 你告诉我," and suggests, "我想要白纸下水," followed by laughter. He advises, "我觉得跟着你的心走吧, 真的." The blonde female participant then decides, "那我要坐一号," and another male voice says, "我选三号吧," leading to a final intense music build-up, splash, and shout, maintaining the lively and competitive mood.

The segment opens with a split-screen, showing two male participants, including the '队长', wearing black '24K风暴' t-shirts, seated on orange '弹射座椅' (Launch Seats) 1 and 2, poised for a challenge in an indoor swimming pool. A dramatic whoosh sound accompanies the '队长's leap from seat 1, followed by a large splash as he lands in the pool. Amidst upbeat, tense background music and general laughter, a male voice, likely the '队长', exclaims, "我不知道!" The scene quickly transitions to close-ups of participants in the water, including '孟子义' who smiles and gestures playfully. The blonde female participant, with platinum blonde hair, reacts with laughter and surprise, and a distinct female voice, likely hers, states, "我二咯," then later, "二号," and instructs, "请在安全距离对话." The game continues with a red selection board flipping to reveal numbers 3 and 4. Another male voice declares, "那我选三," and "我知道了," before another participant jumps from seat 3, marked by a second launch sound and splash. The atmosphere remains lively and comedic, with animated graphics like bunny ears and '娇俏' text appearing over the participants. A male voice, identified as '翟子路' by '孟子义' who exclaims, "翟子路, 好人呐!", reacts with an "啊?" and later says, "我知道，知道你的安全距离," and "快看我人模." Other male voices contribute to the excited chatter and exclamations like "什么? 哪个村头的姑娘那是? 头发一搭了呀来." The scoreboard updates, showing scores for the '24K风暴' team members, with '白鹿' leading at 3 points, '丞磊' at 2, and '翟子路' at 1. The segment concludes with a group shot of the four '24K风暴' team members, each with distinct hairstyles and expressions, as they prepare for the next round, while a male voice announces, "接下来轮到最后一组出战." Poolside branding for '安慕希爆珠酸奶' and '好喝' remains visible, alongside the '浅水区 1.3m' sign, confirming the shallow water area. '等候区 participants' are seen observing from their chairs, draped with yellow towels, adding to the competitive yet playful environment.

The brightly lit indoor swimming pool area sets the scene for a game show-style challenge, as a male voice declares, "今天就是见证的时候" (Today is the time to witness), followed by laughter and a playful "你脸啊" (Your face!). The '队长', a male participant with dark, tousled hair, confidently states, "我做一" (I'll do one), choosing launch seat 1. After being told "请坐" (Please sit), he dramatically leaps with a wide smile, accompanied by a triumphant "Yes!" and a loud splash into the shallow water. The blonde female participant, holding a red '密' token, reacts with surprised laughter and excited "哇!" (Wow!) screams, joined by other '24K风暴 team members' whose collective shouts and laughter fill the air. The '等候区 participants' observe with amusement. A male participant with dark hair exclaims, "不行不行，我今天那么害怕啊" (No, no, I'm so scared today!), followed by laughter and a playful "换一下" (Change it up), as a hand points to a red and white decision board. Another participant is launched with a splash and more excited "Yeah!" and "哇!" shouts. Playful banter continues with "从此咱俩的友谊，够了" (From now on, our friendship is enough). Choices are made, "我选一" (I choose one) and "四" (Four), leading to another dramatic launch, met with prolonged, high-pitched screams and laughter. The male participant with dark hair, who previously expressed fear, exclaims, "又是我！" (It's me again!), followed by more laughter, indicating he's been chosen for another jump. Further choices are heard: "我选二" (I choose two), "那我还是选一吧" (Then I'll still choose one), and a discussion, "三，你觉得可以吗？" (Three, do you think it's okay?) "我觉得可以" (I think it's okay). The segment concludes with a final dramatic sound effect, a splash, and more screams and laughter as another participant is launched, all against the backdrop of prominent '安慕希爆珠酸奶' branding.

event_blocks.summary: As dramatic music builds, participants assemble near numbered orange launch seats labeled '弹射' and '安全' at an indoor swimming pool. The '队长', a male with dark, tousled hair in a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, dramatically leaps from seat 1 into the pool, eliciting a loud splash, excited shouts, laughter, a distinct female laugh, and a male exclaiming "哎呀!". The blonde female participant, also in a black '24K风暴' t-shirt and a white hair accessory, reacts with laughter and surprise, holding a red and white '密' token, while other team members, including a male with dark hair and a female in a blue 'RUN' jacket, also react with amusement. A male voice is heard saying "我坐二" (I'm sitting on two). A scoreboard displays individual scores, with 郑恺, 白鹿, and 李晨 leading with 3 points. An announcer explains that the top three scorers receive five gold coins, members with two points get three coins, and names "张真源" and "翟子路" as receiving only two gold coins. The '金币排行榜' updates to show 郑恺 leading with 12 coins. The brightly lit environment features '安慕希爆珠酸奶' and '好喝' branding on milk carton-shaped stands, and a '浅水区 1.3m' sign, maintaining a lively and competitive atmosphere, punctuated by another dramatic music build-up, a final splash, and more excited reactions.

队长.description: A male participant with dark, tousled hair, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who performs a dramatic leap from launch seat 1, lands in the pool with a splash, and later interacts with the blonde female participant. He is heard saying '我坐二' (I'm sitting on two), possibly indicating his chosen launch seat.

poolside branding.description: Promotional signage for '安慕希爆珠酸奶' (Anmushi Burst Yogurt) and '好喝' (Delicious) displayed on large milk carton-shaped stands near the pool, indicating sponsorship and adding to the game show aesthetic.

金币排行榜 (Coin Ranking).description: A ranking board displaying participants' coin totals, with 郑恺 leading at 12 coins, followed by 李晨 and 范丞丞 at 10 coins, and others at 9 or 7 coins. The announcer's voice directly references the coin distribution rules and specific participant names in relation to this ranking.

female participant in blue 'RUN' jacket.description: A female participant with dark hair styled in braids, wearing a blue jacket with 'RUN' in yellow letters, who appears in a close-up shot laughing, adding to the lively atmosphere. Her laughter is part of the general excited reactions.

scoreboard display.description: A digital scoreboard showing individual scores and coin rankings, with names like 郑恺, 白鹿, 李晨, and others, updating in real-time. An announcer's voice provides detailed explanations of the scoring system, mentioning specific participants like '张真源' and '翟子路' in relation to their coin earnings.

male participant with dark hair.description: A male participant with dark, slightly tousled hair, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who reacts with surprise and amusement, seen in close-ups and during the jump. His excited shouts and laughter are part of the general reactions.

浅水区 sign.description: A vertical white sign with orange text reading '浅水区 1.3m' (Shallow Water Area 1.3m), indicating the depth of the pool, visible near the poolside, adding context to the safety of the challenge.

blonde female participant.description: A female participant with platinum blonde hair styled in curls, adorned with a white hair accessory, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who laughs, gestures playfully, holds the '密' (Secret) token, and reacts with surprise and amusement to the '队长's jump. Her distinct laughter is heard among the excited reactions.

弹射座椅 (Launch Seats).description: Numbered orange platforms (1, 2, 3, 4) along the poolside, labeled '弹射' (Launch) and '安全' (Safe), used by participants to either be launched into the pool or remain safe, serving as central game elements.

raw_segments: The segment opens with a dramatic, building background music as participants gather at an indoor swimming pool, featuring numbered orange launch seats labeled '弹射' and '安全'. The '队长', a male with dark, tousled hair in a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, dramatically leaps from seat 1 into the pool, accompanied by a loud splash and immediate excited shouts and laughter, including a distinct female laugh and a male exclaiming "哎呀!". The blonde female participant, also in a black '24K风暴' t-shirt and a white hair accessory, reacts with laughter and surprise, holding a red and white '密' token, while other team members, including a male with dark hair and a female in a blue 'RUN' jacket, also react with amusement. A male voice is heard saying "我坐二" (I'm sitting on two), possibly the '队长' or another participant. The scene transitions to a scoreboard displaying individual scores, with names like 郑恺, 白鹿, and 李晨 leading with 3 points. An announcer's voice then explains the game mechanics, stating that the top three highest scorers receive five gold coins, members with two points get three coins, and specifically names "张真源" and "翟子路" as only receiving two gold coins. This directly correlates with the '金币排行榜' which updates to show 郑恺 leading with 12 coins. The brightly lit environment features '安慕希爆珠酸奶' and '好喝' branding on milk carton-shaped stands, and a '浅水区 1.3m' sign, maintaining a lively and competitive atmosphere, punctuated by another dramatic music build-up, a final splash, and more excited reactions.

He is heard saying '我坐二' (I'm sitting on two), possibly indicating his chosen launch seat.
global_entity_library.24K风暴 team members: Four real participants (two men, two women) wearing matching black '24K风暴' t-shirts, whose collective shouts, laughter, and "哇!" (Wow!) screams contribute to the lively atmosphere during the launches.
global_entity_library.孟子义: A female participant with dark hair styled in braids, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who is seen in the pool after the jump, smiling and reacting to the event. She is heard clearly identifying "翟子路" and later praising him with "翟子路，好人呐" (Zhai Ziluo, what a good person!), maintaining her active and expressive role in the challenge.

global_entity_library.blonde female participant: A female participant with platinum blonde hair styled in curls, adorned with a white hair accessory, wearing a black '24K风暴' t-shirt, who laughs, gestures playfully, holds the '密' (Secret) token, and reacts with surprise and amusement to the '队长's jump. Her distinct laughter is heard among the excited reactions.

The announcer's voice directly references the coin distribution rules and specific participant names in relation to this ranking.

An announcer's voice provides detailed explanations of the scoring system, mentioning specific participants like '张真源' and '翟子路' in relation to their coin earnings.
